indications.text:
TASMAR is indicated as an adjunct to levodopa and carbidopa for the treatment of
the signs and symptoms of idiopathic Parkinson’s disease. Because of the risk of potentially fatal,
acute fulminant liver failure, TASMAR (tolcapone) should ordinarily be used in patients with
Parkinson’s disease on l-d...
